testcase.name: [1:7] Successful login returns 200 with user data and JWT token
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 400, expected: 201, response time in milliseconds: 45, url: http://localhost:8000/api/auth/signup/, response: {"phone_number":["A user with this phone number already exists."]} classpath:com/ledger/login.feature:21 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:186) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:570) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:560) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:153) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:176) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:637) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: [2:33] Login with a token returns a usable JWT string
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 400, expected: 201, response time in milliseconds: 13, url: http://localhost:8000/api/auth/signup/, response: {"phone_number":["A user with this phone number already exists."]} classpath:com/ledger/login.feature:47 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:186) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:570) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:560) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:153) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:176) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:637) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: [3:63] Login with a phone number that does not exist returns 401
[4:70] Login with a correct phone number but wrong password returns 401
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 400, expected: 201, response time in milliseconds: 11, url: http://localhost:8000/api/auth/signup/, response: {"phone_number":["A user with this phone number already exists."]} classpath:com/ledger/login.feature:84 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:186) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:570) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:560) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:153) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:176) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:637) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: [5:97] Login request missing the password field returns 400
[1:7] Successful signup returns 201 with user data and JWT token
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 400, expected: 201, response time in milliseconds: 15, url: http://localhost:8000/api/auth/signup/, response: {"phone_number":["A user with this phone number already exists."]} classpath:com/ledger/signup.feature:20 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:186) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:570) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:560) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:153) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:176) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:637) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: [2:33] Signup with a duplicate phone number returns 400
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 400, expected: 201, response time in milliseconds: 13, url: http://localhost:8000/api/auth/signup/, response: {"phone_number":["A user with this phone number already exists."]} classpath:com/ledger/signup.feature:47 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:186) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:214) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:570) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:560) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:153) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:176) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:637) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: [3:64] Signup with a password shorter than 8 characters returns 400
[4:80] Signup with a missing required field returns 400
